description.value:
You outstretch your hand, and the Power Seal engraved into you at birth begins to glow brightly as shadowy golden chakra surrounds your hand. When you cast this jutsu, you can choose to produce a Malicious Force Wave or Malicious Force Burst. If this jutsu is cast while you are benefiting from the Phantom's Embrace or Calamity jutsu, reduce the cost of this jutsu by -1 for each one active.

Malicious Force Wave:

You send out a wave of disruptive energy in a 30-foot-long, 15-foot-wide line. All creatures must make a Charisma saving throw:

  • Critical Success: The target becomes immune to the Malicious Force Wave for 1d4 rounds.

  • Success: The target gains 1 rank of Fear until the end of their next turn.

  • Failure: The target briefly sees only you and themselves, as everything else becomes black, unable to perceive or hear anyone or anything. The target gains 3 ranks of Fear and is Confused for 1 minute. They also drop any items they may be holding. Affected targets repeat this saving throw at the end of their turns, ending this jutsu's effects on a success.

  • Critical Failure: Same effects as a Failure, and the target gains an additional rank of Fear, is Slowed, and falls prone.

Malicious Force Burst:

Select a space within 90 feet of you. You generate a torrent of malicious chakra in a 15-foot cube originating from this space. All creatures within range must make a Wisdom saving throw:

  • Success: The target takes half as much damage and suffers no other effects.

  • Failure: The target takes 8d8 psychic damage, is Dazed and Concussed. You also fling the target up to 30 feet away along the ground.

  • Critical Failure: The target takes 8d10 psychic damage, is Dazed, Concussed, and for the next minute, has their AC reduced by -1 and DR reduced by -3. You also fling the target up to 10 feet in the air and up to 60 feet away along the ground.

You can cast this jutsu as an action in two different ways. If this jutsu is cast while gaining the benefits of the Phantom's Embrace or Calamity Hijutsu, reduce the cost of this jutsu by 2 for each jutsu active.
